nasa_apod.title: NGC 3310: A Starburst Spiral Galaxy
nasa_apod.explanation: The party is still going on in spiral galaxy NGC 3310.  Roughly 100 million years ago, NGC 3310 likely collided with a smaller galaxy causing the large spiral galaxy to light up with a tremendous burst of star formation.
